Pharmacy Technician

License Transfer by State

National License CPhT (Certified Pharmacy Technician)
National Exam PTCE (Pharmacy Technician Certification Exam)
Renewal Cycle 2 years

Endorsement States

51

Open the state guide to verify current fee and timing details on the board site.

Try adjusting your search or clearing your filters.

How to use this directory

Use the path filter to focus on endorsement or CDR states. Sort by extra steps, then open any state guide to verify current fees and processing details directly with the board.
